overall.description: First-person perspective from inside a truck cabin driving through a rainy urban environment in a truck simulation game. The vehicle follows a white box truck through city streets, stops at a traffic light, and continues through an intersection with active windshield wipers and dashboard instrumentation visible throughout.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban arterial road with commercial buildings and noise barriers

agents.ego_description: driving steadily behind a white box truck on a wet multi-lane city street with windshield wipers active

notable_agents.action: white box truck driving ahead in the same lane, maintaining steady speed

entered.detail: tall grey concrete wall running parallel to the road on the left side
modern building with large glass windows and ground floor retail
row of trees lining the sidewalk along the commercial buildings

segments.scene_description: The truck drives along a wet city street during heavy rain, following a white box truck. A concrete noise barrier runs along the left side while modern glass-fronted commercial buildings line the right. Windshield wipers sweep continuously across the view.

events.description: truck comes to a complete stop at a red traffic light behind the white box truck

agents.ego_description: stopped at red traffic light, waiting behind the white box truck with brake lights illuminated

notable_agents.action: white box truck stopped at red light with brake lights on

entered.detail: horizontal traffic signal showing red light suspended over the intersection
white zebra stripes painted on the road surface marking pedestrian crossing

segments.scene_description: The truck is stationary at a red traffic light at an intersection. The white box truck waits directly ahead with its brake lights glowing. Crosswalk markings are visible on the wet asphalt, and the traffic light hangs overhead showing red.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with crosswalks and corner buildings

events.description: traffic light changes to green and truck begins accelerating forward
truck initiates a right turn at the intersection following the white box truck

agents.ego_description: accelerating through the intersection and executing a right turn onto a new street

notable_agents.action: white box truck turning right ahead, guiding the path through the intersection

entered.detail: historic stone building with ornate facade marking the corner of the intersection
broad pedestrian crossing with white stripes spanning the intersection

segments.scene_description: As the light turns green, the truck accelerates through the intersection, navigating a right turn. The white box truck leads the way through the turn. A stone corner building becomes prominent on the left as the vehicle leaves the main arterial road.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban commercial street with bus stops and mixed buildings

events.description: truck approaches and begins following a silver sedan that has merged into the lane ahead

agents.ego_description: driving along the new street following a silver sedan with the white box truck further ahead, maintaining safe following distance in heavy rain

notable_agents.action: silver sedan driving ahead with brake lights occasionally illuminating

entered.detail: distinctive yellow-painted commercial building with multiple stories and signage
covered bus stop with glass panels and bench on the right sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The truck proceeds along a new urban street featuring a distinctive yellow commercial building and a bus stop shelter on the right. The vehicle follows a silver sedan closely while the white box truck continues further ahead. Rain continues to fall heavily with wipers maintaining visibility.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from a truck cabin as it navigates a rainy urban environment, transitioning from a main arterial road into a side street. It begins by following a white box truck along a wet city street lined with a concrete noise barrier and glass-fronted commercial buildings, with windshield wipers sweeping continuously through the heavy rain. The movement then comes to a halt at a red traffic light, where the camera lingers on the glowing brake lights of the lead truck and the crosswalk markings on the asphalt. As the light turns green, the vehicle accelerates and executes a right turn, passing a prominent stone corner building as it leaves the main road. The scene finally shifts to a new urban street, gliding past a yellow commercial building and a bus stop shelter while following a silver sedan and the distant white box truck through the persistent downpour.
